2018November 4, 2018

🇺🇸 Chicago, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Chicago, United States, November 4, 2018 -- November 9, 2018

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2018-11-chicago-usa

20 Resolutions

1001Plenary
Disband WG 2 and assign ISO 13584 to JWG 24
SC 4 assigns ISO 13584 to JWG 24.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1000Plenary
Transfer ISO 22745 and ISO 29002 to WG 13
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to coordinate with ISO/CS and transfer ISO 22745 and ISO 29002 and all their parts from WG 2 to WG 13.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
999Plenary
Agree on path forward for Edition 2 of ISO 10303-242
SC 4 agrees that the following points specified by WG 12 for the way forward with AP 242ed2 DIS and the extended architecture specification shall be used as a basis for the second AP 242ed2 DIS bal...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
998Plenary
Submit Quality Information Framework for fast track ballot
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to submit QIF 3.0, together with its harvesting explanatory report and the mapping between STEP and QIF MBD for DIS ballot under the fast track procedure.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
997Plenary
Establish PWI for Industrial Requirements for Product Data Visualization
SC 4 launches a PWI to update its requirements for visualization and to create a Technical Report on "Industrial Requirements for Product Data Visualization".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
996Plenary
Apply 8-week ballot duration to NPs for 10303 parts
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the following NPs for 10303: * 10303-15 (SysML XMI to XSD binding) * 10303-16 (SysML XMI to EXPRESS binding) * 10303-17 (EXPRESS...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
995Plenary
Apply 8-week ballot duration to future NP for 14306ed3
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the future NP for 14306ed3, JT file format specification for 3D visualization following a successful review by JWG 16 for scope ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
994Plenary
Apply 8-week ballot duration to NP for 10303-59ed3
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the NP for 10303-59ed3, Integrated generic resource: Quality of product shape data.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
993Plenary
Apply 8-week ballot duration to NP for 8000-81
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the NP for 8000-81, Data quality assessment based on data profiling.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
992Plenary
Correct title of ISO 8000-116
SC 4 approves change of the title "Data quality -- Part 116: Application of ISO 8000-115 to the formatting of Authoritative Legal Entity Identifiers (ALEI) for individuals and organizations" to "Da...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
991Plenary
Remove ISO 8000-3 from the ISO work programme
SC 4 cancels the project 60784 for ISO/NP TS 8000-3.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
990Plenary
Move ISO 10303-238ed2 to 48-month development track
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to move the ISO 10303-238ed2 project from 36 months to the 48 month development track.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
989Plenary
Appoint Tim King as WG 23 Convenor
SC 4 expresses its appreciation and gratitude to Aminata Mbengue for her service as Convenor of WG 23 since its inception and wishes her all success in future endeavours.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
988Plenary
Reappoint Nils Sandsmark as WG 22 Convenor
SC 4 appoints Nils Sandsmark as Convenor for the WG 22, "Reference data validation team" for a further three year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
987Plenary
Reappoint Martin Hardwick and Bengt Olsson as WG 15 Convenors
SC 4 appoints Martin Hardwick as Convenor and Bengt Olsson as Deputy Convenor for the WG 15 "Digital Manufacturing" for a further three year term, with appreciation for their offers to serve in tho...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
986Plenary
Approve Project Leaders and Project Editors for SC 4 Projects
SC 4 approves the following Project Leaders and Project Editors for the associated Projects: |=== |Project |Working Group |Project Leader/Editor |ISO 15926-10 |WG 3 |Leader: Paul Van Exel |ISO 1592...

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
